summary: One integration test (dubbo-samples-test-11137) failed because its test container did not start in time and the test run hit the 600s timeout; Docker reported errors while attempting to manage containers.
root_cause: The integration test dubbo-samples-test-11137 timed out waiting for its test container to become ready (timeout configured as 600s); Docker returned errors (HTTP 500 and missing-container responses) during container startup/cleanup.

evidence.quote: wait for container is timeout: 602 s
evidence.reason: Shows the test harness waited for a container and exceeded the allowed wait time.
Explicit error message stating the test run timed out.
Displays the configured timeout value (600s) used for the test run.

evidence.quote: Error response from daemon: received unexpected HTTP status: 500 Internal Server Error
evidence.reason: Docker daemon returned an HTTP 500 while pulling/starting containers, indicating container management failures during startup/cleanup.

evidence.quote: Error response from daemon: No such container: dubbo-samples-test-11137--zookeeper-1
evidence.reason: Docker could not find containers that the test expected to inspect/stop, indicating failed or incomplete container creation.
Points to the logs directory for the failing test, supporting investigation of the container start/timeout.

evidence.quote: /home/runner/work/dubbo/dubbo/99-integration/dubbo-samples-test-11137/target/docker-compose.yml: the attribute `version` is obsolete, it will be ignored, please remove it to avoid potential confusion
evidence.reason: Shows the docker-compose file used and a warning that may affect compose behavior; relevant to container startup issues.

suggested_fix: Inspect the logs at /home/runner/work/dubbo/dubbo/99-integration/dubbo-samples-test-11137/target/logs for container startup errors; address the Docker daemon 500 errors (check daemon health and registry/network access); consider increasing the test timeout (>600s) or fixing the container startup (docker-compose.yml) so the test container can become ready within the timeout.
